items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of sending a digital ticket to the client email/app.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation that a digital ticket is sent to the client email/app, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this action has taken place. The linked use case mentions the need for a digital ticket to be sent, yet the prior steps do not include any details or evidence regarding the actual sending of such tickets. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
